overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a post-apocalyptic outdoor market area at sunset. The player moves past yellow vendor stalls, circles a golden dolphin statue, and navigates through debris alongside a massive collapsed stadium structure with purple neon lighting before ascending a grassy hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market with yellow vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past yellow vendor stalls displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' signage

entered.detail: bright yellow modular stalls with 'PURE OVERKILL' digital signage and solar panels on roof
tall palm trees scattered throughout the market area
modern street lamp posts with dual fixtures
distant rocky hills and mountains under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a sunlit outdoor market. Yellow vendor stalls line the right side while palm trees and distant mountains frame the background. The ground is paved asphalt, and a few pedestrians are scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with golden dolphin statue and collapsed stadium view

events.description: moving from narrow vendor corridor into open plaza with central statue

agents.ego_description: circling around the golden dolphin statue while observing the massive collapsed structure ahead

notable_agents.action: person in brown jacket walking past the statue

entered.detail: large metallic gold dolphin sculpture on tiered white pedestal
massive collapsed metal framework with glowing purple neon lights inside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a striking golden dolphin statue. The camera circles the statue, revealing the massive collapsed stadium structure with purple neon lighting on the right. Pedestrians move through the plaza as the sun casts long golden shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris field alongside collapsed stadium structure

events.description: entering debris-filled area with trash piles and collapsed metal structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through scattered trash and debris alongside the collapsed stadium wall

entered.detail: large piles of garbage in blue and clear bags scattered on ground
dark green metal dumpster with closed lid

segments.scene_description: Moving past the statue, the environment becomes cluttered with trash piles and debris. The camera walks alongside the massive collapsed stadium structure, which now dominates the center view with its twisted metal beams and purple neon glow. The ground transitions to dirt and gravel.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascending away from stadium

events.description: beginning ascent up grassy hill away from collapsed structure
reaching top of hill with view of road and residential buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing up the grassy hillside away from the market area toward the road above

entered.detail: steep dirt and grass covered slope with scattered bushes
paved road visible at top of hill with passing vehicle
small houses and structures on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent up a grassy hillside, leaving the debris field behind. The collapsed stadium structure recedes into the left background as the camera climbs toward a road above. Residential buildings appear on the left, and the ground becomes covered with grass and dirt as the sun sets behind the structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit outdoor market through a ruined urban plaza and up a grassy hillside. It begins by walking past yellow vendor stalls on paved asphalt, with palm trees and distant mountains framing the horizon. As the path opens into a wide plaza, the camera circles a striking golden dolphin statue, revealing a massive collapsed stadium structure illuminated by purple neon lighting. The scene then shifts into a cluttered debris field of trash and twisted metal beams as the ground transitions from pavement to dirt and gravel. Finally, the camera ascends a grassy slope, leaving the stadium and ruins behind to climb toward an upper road flanked by residential buildings under a setting sun.
